source_pr.title: store/copr: polish the tiflash-tikv fallback function.
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary:
fallback to tikv when batch cop or mpp meets io error

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:
Convert all kinds of io error in BatchCop and MPP to "TiFlashTimeout" error which can be identified by fallback function and retry in TiKV mode.
For now, mpp io error cannot be retried by itself. So even not a fatal error can be routed to tikv's retry. This problem can be tackled after we support mpp client's retry.

### Related changes

- PR to update `unistore`: https://github.com/ngaut/unistore/pull/438 fix a leak in unistore after processing mpp request.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test for batch cop, mpp test.


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- store/copr: polish the tiflash-tikv fallback function.

symptoms: Intermittent TiFlash I/O errors/timeouts cause batch-coprocessor or MPP requests to fail instead of falling back to TiKV
failure_signature: TiFlashTimeout / ErrTiFlashServerTimeout leading to fallback/retry behavior differences
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to external dependency instability: TiFlash batch-coprocessor/MPP requests could hit transient I/O errors (including timeout-like errors) and fail without being reliably recognized by the TiFlash→TiKV fallback path. This PR stabilizes it by normalizing these I/O errors into `TiFlashTimeout` so the fallback function can consistently route the request to TiKV mode and retry there.
fix_pattern: Normalize TiFlash I/O errors to `TiFlashTimeout` so fallback logic can detect them and retry in TiKV mode.

evidence: files: go.mod, go.sum, server/conn_test.go, store/copr/batch_coprocessor.go, store/copr/batch_request_sender.go, store/copr/mpp.go, store/mockstore/unistore/cophandler/mpp.go, store/mockstore/unistore/cophandler/mpp_exec.go, store/mockstore/unistore/rpc.go, store/tikv/region_request_test.go
